mapper.select: SELECT md.id, md.major_id, m.major_name, md.direction_name, md.direction_code, md.level, md.years, md.is_segmented, md.phase1_level, md.phase1_years, md.phase2_level, md.phase2_years, md.remarks FROM major_directions md LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id WHERE md.deleted = 0 AND md.major_id = #{majorId} ORDER BY md.created_at

SELECT md.id, md.major_id, m.major_name, md.direction_name, md.direction_code, md.level, md.years, md.is_segmented, md.phase1_level, md.phase1_years, md.phase2_level, md.phase2_years FROM major_directions md LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id WHERE md.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.major_name, md.direction_name
SELECT md.*, m.major_name FROM major_directions md LEFT JOIN majors m ON md.major_id = m.id WHERE md.id = #{id} AND md.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE major_directions SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND deleted = 0
